features: ECO-FRIENDLY BUT POWERFUL: The Paul Anthony 1600w "Eco-Dry" Hair Dryer can be used to style all different types of hair, from short and curly to long and sculptured, with 3 speed settings to choose from to best suit your hair type.

3 SPEED SETTINGS, 3 HEAT SETTINGS & COOL SHOT: This hairdryer delivers max 1600w output with 3 fan speed settings and 3 airflow heat settings. Switch between off, low and high speeds to operate the fan motor at different speeds dependant upon the hair style requirements. During use, you can press and hold the cool shot button to change the output air temperature from hot to cold. Once the cool shot is released, the output air temperature will revert back to the temperature set by the heat switch.
CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE ATTACHMENT: The removable concentrator nozzle attachment helps to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair, for a sleeker look.

SAFE AND PRACTICAL: This hair dryer is fitted with a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device over heating. This device features a folding handle function, meaning it is very compact and will fold up and fit in to your weekend bag or suitcase easily, there is also a hanging loop attached, meaning it is easy to store and makes it perfect for travel all round.
QUIET DC MOTOR: This DC motor creates a quieter and lighter hair dryer.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony "Eco Dry" 1600w Hair Dryer is quiet yet powerful and suits all different hair types. Pick from 3 fan speed setting and 3 airflow heat settings, it can be tailored to you. Simply plug in to the mains power and set the temperature and heat to your desired settings. Tailor your experience with a concentrated nozzle, helping to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair. This hairdryer has a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device overheating. This product has a quiet DC motor operation, yet still has 1600w power. Box Includes: 1x Paul Anthony "Eco Dry" Hair Dryer 1x Concentrator Nozzle 1x Instruction Manual Safety Warning Always unplug the device after use, avoid touching the nozzle during operation, and be cautious of overheating as the device has a thermal cut-out safety feature. Box Contains 1 x Lloytron Hairdryer; Manual See more
